headline: Three Oil Stocks Circle Buy Points With Crude Prices High
summary: Valero Energy and two other refiners topped buy points this week amid high crude oil prices, before slipping somewhat on Wednesday.

raw.headline: Three Oil Stocks Circle Buy Points With Crude Prices High

headline: Is Trump Letting The Strait Of Hormuz Stay Closed? US Refiners Aren't Complaining
summary: US refined product exports hit a record 7.92 million b/d in the four weeks ending May 8, with refinery utilization at multi-year highs and inventories at five-year lows. The Trump administration is in no rush to reopen Hormuz.

headline: Energy Stocks Are Secretly Better Than Treasuries. Here’s Why Bob Brackett Is Loading Up on Exxon and Chevron.
summary: Bernstein analyst Bob Brackett has a reframe for income investors who keep dismissing energy stocks because the headline yield looks thin against the 10-year Treasury. On a recent episode of The Real Eisman Playbook, Brackett argued the comparison is the wrong one entirely. “Don’t compare the yields you get from a commodity company to government ... Energy Stocks Are Secretly Better Than Treasuries. Here’s Why Bob Brackett Is Loading Up on Exxon and Chevron.
